    Loading…
    Sushi U is a Japanese restaurant in Crystal Lake, IL, known for its fresh ingredients, diverse menu, and options for dine-in, takeout, and delivery, including sushi, ramen, hibachi, and poke bowls. They offer lunch specials, an "all you can eat" option, and a variety of rolls, with a focus on healthier preparation methods. Popular items include the Spicy Tuna Roll, Shrimp Tempura Roll, and various poke bowls. 
    Links
      +8
      Sushi U is a Japanese restaurant in Crystal Lake, IL, known for its fresh ingredients, diverse menu, and options for dine-in, takeout, and delivery, including sushi, ramen, hibachi, and poke bowls. They offer lunch specials, an "all you can eat" option, and a variety of rolls, with a focus on healthier preparation methods. Popular items include the Spicy Tuna Roll, Shrimp Tempura Roll, and various poke bowls. 
      Menu highlights
      • Sushi: A wide selection of maki rolls (e.g., California, Spicy Tuna, Philadelphia), chef's special rolls, and sushi/sashimi combos. 
      • Other Japanese Cuisine: Ramen noodle soup, bento boxes, and hibachi entrees. 
      • Poke Bowls: Options like Spicy Salmon, Tuna, and Chicken. 
      • Specials: Lunch specials (2 or 3 rolls with soup/salad) and dinner specials. 
      Service options
      • Dine-in
      • Takeout/Pickup
      • Delivery (via services like Grubhub, Uber Eats, Seamless) 
      Key features
      • Focus on fresh, natural ingredients.
      • "All you can eat" option available.
      • Accepts Apple Pay.

        Reviews are automatically processed to detect inappropriate content like fake reviews and spam. We may take down reviews that are flagged in order to comply with Google policies or legal obligations.

        Diners like this sushi restaurant's fresh and delicious sushi, including popular options like shrimp tempura and California rolls, and appreciate the excellent value of their all-you-can-eat option. They also highlight the welcoming atmosphere and the friendly, attentive staff.
